project_overview.name: InstaChat Viewer
project_overview.core_goal: A high-fidelity, responsive, dark-mode Instagram chat viewer that reads messages from an embedded JSON file.
project_overview.emotional_vibe: Nostalgic, Sleek, Immersive, Premium Dark Mode.

typography.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

layout.name: ChatLayout
layout.structure: Flex container, h-screen, overflow-hidden. Sidebar (w-[350px] or w-[400px]) on left (hidden mobile), ChatArea flex-1 on right.

sidebar.name: ThreadList
sidebar.item_style: Hover:bg-[#121212] transition-colors cursor-pointer p-4 flex items-center gap-3
sidebar.avatar_size: h-12 w-12 or h-14 w-14 rounded-full

chat_area.name: MessageStream
chat_area.header_style: h-[60px] border-b border-[#262626] flex items-center px-6 sticky top-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl z-10
chat_area.input_placeholder_style: h-[60px] m-4 rounded-[22px] border border-[#262626] bg-[#121212] flex items-center px-4 text-[#A8A8A8] (Visual only)

message_bubble.name: ChatBubble
message_bubble.sent_style: bg-[#3797F0] text-white self-end ml-auto rounded-[22px] rounded-br-sm mb-1 max-w-[75%]
message_bubble.received_style: bg-[#262626] text-white self-start mr-auto rounded-[22px] rounded-bl-sm mb-1 max-w-[75%]
message_bubble.grouping_logic: If same sender as prev, reduce vertical margin (mb-0.5) and adjust corner radius.

data_integration.structure_handling: The app must be resilient. It should look for 'messages' array. If inside 'conversations' object, drill down. If at root, use it.
data_integration.user_identification: Check 'sender_name'. If === 'Aditya', treat as SENT. Else RECEIVED.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Inter' font for a clean, modern look.
Dark mode is MANDATORY. Do not create a light mode toggle.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Send, Info, Phone, Video).
Do NOT use gradients for message bubbles unless specifically requested as an 'accent' mode. Default to Blue (#3797F0).
Ensure the JSON file is imported properly. If missing, show a graceful 'No Data' state or a demo message set.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Create a dummy 'instagram_data.json' in '/app/frontend/src/data/' with the structure found in research (participants, messages array).
3. Build the 'MessageBubble' component with the conditional styling.
4. Implement the logic to parse the JSON and group messages by sender for visual grouping.
5. Ensure the sidebar lists the 'participants' from the JSON (excluding the user 'Aditya').
